title: Implement Inbox-Zero Automation Policy
instruction:
Read the email from ops lead Priya Sharma (priya.sharma@blueridge.dev) with subject "Inbox Zero policy - implement now". Follow every instruction:
(1) Create 5 labels with specified visibility:
    - "Auto/Vendor" (show in label list, hide in message list)
    - "Auto/CI-CD" (show in label list, show in message list)
    - "Auto/Newsletters" (hide in label list, hide in message list)
    - "Auto/Billing" (show in label list, show in message list)
    - "Auto/Social" (hide in label list, hide in message list)
(2) Create 6 filters:
    - From: *@vendors.blueridge.dev → add label "Auto/Vendor", skip inbox, mark as read
    - From: ci@github.com, Subject contains: "build" → add label "Auto/CI-CD", skip inbox
    - From: *@newsletter.blueridge.dev → add label "Auto/Newsletters", skip inbox, mark as read
    - From: billing@stripe.com → add label "Auto/Billing", star
    - From: billing@aws.amazon.com → add label "Auto/Billing", star
    - From: *@social.blueridge.dev → add label "Auto/Social", skip inbox
(3) Archive all existing emails in the inbox that match any of the 6 filter criteria above.
(4) Star every email in the inbox received in the last 24 hours that does NOT match any of the 6 filter criteria.
Ignore the older draft policy email — only follow the latest "implement now" version.
eval_check_descriptions: Auto/Vendor label exists with correct visibility
Auto/CI-CD label exists with correct visibility
Auto/Newsletters label exists with correct visibility
Auto/Billing label exists with correct visibility
Auto/Social label exists with correct visibility
Vendor filter exists with correct actions
CI-CD filter exists with correct actions
Newsletter filter exists with correct actions
Billing Stripe filter exists with correct actions
Billing AWS filter exists with correct actions
Social filter exists with correct actions
CI-CD non-matching email (release, no build) NOT archived
CI-CD release email (recent, non-matching) is starred
Billing emails starred per filter action

emails.subject: Inbox Zero policy - implement now
emails.body:
Please implement the following Inbox Zero policy immediately.

LABELS (with visibility):
- Auto/Vendor: show in label list, hide in message list
- Auto/CI-CD: show in label list, show in message list
- Auto/Newsletters: hide in label list, hide in message list
- Auto/Billing: show in label list, show in message list
- Auto/Social: hide in label list, hide in message list

FILTERS:
1. From: *@vendors.blueridge.dev → label Auto/Vendor, skip inbox, mark as read
2. From: ci@github.com, Subject contains: "build" → label Auto/CI-CD, skip inbox
3. From: *@newsletter.blueridge.dev → label Auto/Newsletters, skip inbox, mark as read
4. From: billing@stripe.com → label Auto/Billing, star
5. From: billing@aws.amazon.com → label Auto/Billing, star
6. From: *@social.blueridge.dev → label Auto/Social, skip inbox

INBOX CLEANUP:
- Archive all existing emails matching any of the 6 filter criteria above.
- Star every email from the last 24 hours that does NOT match any filter criteria.

Thanks,
Priya

emails.subject: Draft inbox zero policy - DO NOT implement
emails.body:

Labels: Automated/Vendor, Automated/CI-CD, Automated/Newsletters.
Filters: 3 filters matching the above categories.
No starring rule in this version.

This is a DRAFT — do not implement. Final version coming soon.

Thanks,
Priya
